rationale: M12 is structural decision; M13 adds biochemical/rulebook evidence
downstream_effect: Feeds refined evidence matrix and final interpretation

value: Section 8 rulebook was calibrated on a benchmark protein/family set
rationale: It must not be blindly forced onto new full families
downstream_effect: Family coverage must be checked explicitly

rationale: New families or mismatching evidence patterns should not be forced into old classes

value: Primary/rank-1 evidence remains the main automated interpretation anchor
rationale: Consistent with M12 primary decision matrix
downstream_effect: Rulebook may refine but must retain primary/supporting distinction

value: Supporting rank-2-to-rank-5 references provide context and warnings, not automatic confirmation
rationale: Prevents holo supporting structure from overclaiming function
downstream_effect: Add supporting ligand/cofactor flags without overriding primary

value: Primary apo/no-ligand does not automatically weaken candidate
rationale: PDB ligand absence can be experimental artifact
downstream_effect: Add PRIMARY_APO_OR_NO_LIGAND and check supporting references

value: Supporting PDB ligand/cofactor context should be retained as supporting evidence
rationale: Can explain why rank-1 is not chemically informative

value: Known catalytic/cofactor residues may override lack of ligand evidence only when family-specific rule exists
rationale: CoA_trans Glu54-like cases need explicit curated rule

value: Motif/residue conservation is family-specific and must not be generalized blindly
rationale: Broad families can share fold but differ in function
downstream_effect: Unmatched motifs become NEW_RULE_NEEDED or MANUAL_REVIEW

value: Metals/cofactors require biological interpretation; raw HETATM is not enough

rationale: Partial/low conservation is not automatically negative
